data.settleTest: The commissioned IndexBox EU Rack PDUs country-table report (or an equivalent directly-scoped Europe/CE rack-PDU figure) would settle this today — it pins the base directly rather than relying on a global anchor × unsourced 30% hop. This is a definitional/scope-mismatch about today's market, not a future unfolding.

proposedCorrection.rationale: The Europe share is an unsourced analyst guess and the global anchor itself ranges $1.58B–$4.8B, so the lower bound must widen to ~€200M to honestly reflect the contested inputs until the directly-scoped EU figure is commissioned.

researchQueries.query: IndexBox 'Rack PDUs Market in the European Union' country tables — headline EU rack-PDU market value in EUR for 2024/2025
Grand View Research or QY Research regional breakdown giving Europe's revenue share of the global data center rack-PDU market (to test whether 30% or a much lower/higher share holds)
